case_title: WAH KWONG YU VS. HONS'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA), LTD.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF YU, WAH KWONG AS TO DEFENDANT HONS'S WUN-TUN HOUSE (CALIFORNIA), LTD., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
